title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York and $85M+ raised, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role builds and scales the operational backbone of the GTM engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and a leader-doer mindset comfortable building flows, dashboards and data models while aligning Sales, Marketing, Finance and HR across distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience exceeds 7+ requirement, proven RevOps scaling credentials align perfectly with $85M+ raised company, strong Salesforce and analytics expertise, and hybrid NY/Tel Aviv setup matches his location preferences with Tel Aviv as primary hub.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and immediately thought of you—scaling the operational backbone for a $85M+ funded FinTech SaaS company across distributed US/Israel teams is exactly the kind of strategic RevOps challenge you've built a track record solving. Your experience scaling GTM engines beyond $30M ARR and deep Salesforce expertise would be critical to what they're building in cloud cost management. Would be worth a conversation with their CRO about how you'd structure their revenue analytics and cross-functional alignment.

title: RevOps Expert
description: Remote, a fully remote global employment platform, is hiring a RevOps Expert to optimize sales processes and system architecture. You'll drive strategic initiatives aligned with GTM strategy, champion scalable process design, and implement solutions using Six Sigma and Agile methodologies. Requirements include deep Salesforce (SFDC) and enterprise SaaS expertise, experience with tools like LeanData, Zapier or Camunda, strong process design skills, and a data-driven mindset. Proven SaaS and B2B experience and prior work in remote, globally distributed startups are preferred. Base salary $51,100–$115,000 USD.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps expertise, Salesforce depth, B2B SaaS background, and global remote experience. Minor concern: salary range ($51-115K) may be below market for a 15+ year senior executive, and role lacks explicit GTM strategy leadership scope typical of Head-level positions.
ai_opener: I noticed Remote is building out RevOps infrastructure for a globally distributed team—that's exactly the complexity I've spent 15 years mastering in scaling B2B SaaS. With deep Salesforce architecture experience and a track record optimizing pipeline forecasting and CAC/LTV metrics across remote orgs, I'm curious how you're thinking about process standardization across time zones and whether you're open to exploring how RevOps strategy can directly impact your GTM velocity.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a leader in revenue intelligence, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. You'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy, scalable territory design, and consultative partnership with business leaders. Responsibilities include ensuring smooth GTM initiative execution via impact analysis and change management, building dashboards and regional insights, redesigning territory models for global scalability, and partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. Salary $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience. Territory strategy, GTM execution, dashboards, and cross-functional leadership align perfectly with Omri's core strengths in pipeline forecasting and revenue operations.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable RevOps functions in B2B SaaS, and I've been following Gong's evolution as a revenue intelligence leader. Your Territory Strategy & Operations role caught my attention because scaling territory models and driving GTM impact through data-driven insights is exactly where I've added the most value—I'd be interested in exploring how my experience designing territory frameworks and forecasting models could accelerate your growth initiatives.

title: Senior RevOps Manager: Support Operations
description: Apollo.io is hiring a Senior RevOps Manager focused on Support Operations to operationalize the support team and make them more efficient and effective at customer and revenue retention. You'll be part of a lean, remote team empowered to own your role as a proactive educator, helping customers maximize their revenue potential on the Apollo platform at scale. The role is highly collaborative across adjacent departments, and you'll be encouraged to experiment and take educated risks that lead to meaningful wins.
score_reason: Strong RevOps title and remote eligibility, but Support Operations focus is tangential to Omri's core GTM/pipeline revenue engine expertise. Better fit would be a role directly managing sales ops, forecasting, or go-to-market efficiency rather than customer success/support operationalization.

I noticed you're scaling your support operations for retention – my background in pipeline architecture and GTM efficiency could bring a different lens to operationalizing support workflows at scale, especially around connecting support signals back to revenue outcomes.

description: Engine, a fast-growing work travel and fintech platform used by 20,000+ companies and backed by Blackstone and Permira, seeks a Senior RevOps Program Manager to own the operational rhythm of its GTM engine. title: GTM Engineer

title: GTM Engineer

description: Own how Theator shows up in the market. Turn product and engineering outcomes into market momentum, demand, and qualified leads. Translate complex AI surgical platform capabilities into simple outcome-driven stories. Own channel strategy: LinkedIn, email, partnerships, communities, events. AI fluency required — actively use AI to create leverage. High autonomy, fast-moving startup.
score_reason: Strong match — Growth Marketing Lead at AI healthtech startup in Tel Aviv. High autonomy, AI-native, full-funnel ownership. Israel-based.
ai_opener: Omri here — turning complex product capabilities into clear market momentum is exactly what I do. At Theator specifically, I'm drawn to the challenge of making surgical AI impossible to ignore in a market where credibility and proof points are everything.
